tasks.completion_summary: Added streaming file reader helpers (Open-BashFileReader, Read-BashFileStreaming) and migrated cat/head/tail to use StreamReader directly. Replaced 4 Get-Content -Raw calls with [IO.File]::ReadAllText. All 816 Pester + 647 dotnet tests pass.

Moved ToString() ScriptMethod from per-object Add-Member to type-level Update-TypeData. 15x faster object creation (4581ms to 302ms for 50K objects). All 24 PSTypeNames registered at module init. All 816 Pester + 647 dotnet tests pass.

Verified head and tail are already fully streaming from iteration 1. head uses Open-BashFileReader with early exit (reads exactly N lines). tail uses circular buffer for -n mode (O(k) memory) and streaming skip for +N mode. All 816 Pester + 647 dotnet tests pass.

Bare cat (no flags) now emits lightweight TextOutput objects (1 property: BashText) instead of CatLine objects (4 properties: LineNumber, Content, FileName, BashText). Uses Read-BashFileBytes per file + Emit-BashLine. Flagged cat (-n/-b/-s/-E/-T) still uses CatLine. Updated 30 tests to check BashText instead of Content. All 817 Pester + 647 dotnet tests pass.
